What We Offer

Our staging &
decor services

Book a consultation →
01

Consultations

Comprehensive walkthroughs covering presale strategy, colour selection, and decor recommendations. Includes verbal guidance on the day — with an optional detailed written report available for $250.

Free + optional $250 report
02

Occupied Staging

For homeowners still living in their space. Walk-through, staging plan, furniture placement optimization, and styling using your pieces combined with ours for maximum market appeal.

$1,100 starter package
03

Vacant Staging

Full-service staging for empty properties. Curated furniture, art, and accessories transform vacant spaces into warm, market-ready homes that attract buyers and maximize sale price.

$1,600 starter package
04

Luxury Staging

Premium full-service staging for upscale and high-end properties. Elevated furniture, designer art, and curated accessories that create a truly luxurious, show-stopping presentation.

$3,900 starting at
Also Available

Home Decoration Services

Your home should reflect your personality, offer comfort, and inspire joy. Our home decoration services transform your lived-in space into a stylish, functional interior tailored to your lifestyle — whether you're refreshing a single room or reimagining your entire home.

From colour consultations and furniture selection to full interior decorating, we bring a creative, personal touch to every project across the GTA.

How It Works

A simple, seamless process

01

Free Consultation

Complimentary walkthrough to assess your space and discuss staging or decor goals. Optional written report for $250.

02

Custom Strategy

Personalized recommendations tailored to your home, timeline, and budget — from starter to luxury packages.

03

Staging Day

Our team arrives with curated furniture, art, and accessories — transforming your space beautifully and efficiently.

04

Sold & Settled

Your home photographs beautifully, attracts more buyers, and sells faster. We handle pickup once the deal is done.

The Designer

Alex Staging and Decor
Oakville

I provide high-end house staging and interior decor solutions designed to make a lasting impression. My approach to real estate staging focuses on highlighting your property’s best features to appeal to the widest range of buyers across Oakville, Burlington, and the GTA.

Whether you are looking for a full home transformation or professional house staging advice, I ensure your space is market-ready, helping you sell faster and for a higher return on investment.
